seoTitle: Tamborine vs Tamborine Mountain — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tamborine and Tamborine Mountain. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tamborine vs Tamborine Mountain: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tamborine and Tamborine Mountain.
heading: Tamborine vs Tamborine Mountain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tamborine, Queensland and Tamborine Mountain, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tamborine has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tamborine Mountain (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tamborine or Tamborine Mountain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tamborine has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Tamborine Mountain scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tamborine scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Tamborine Mountain scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tamborine or Tamborine Mountain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tamborine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
